content:
Now let me load the Battlefield skill to see how to post.Now I have everything. Let me build the GitHub links and post the report.Now let me post the report to Battlefield.Abdul Samad, I need your approval to post this report to the Battlefield dashboard.

Here's exactly what the command does:

**POST to `battlefield.cosmicstack.org/api/report`** — reporting your last 3 commits as a completion entry for the live dashboard.

**Report summary:**
- **Title:** Loop detection, permission modes, and stream rendering fixes
- **Points:** 150 AP
- **Commits:**
  1. `1880fe0` — Robust loop detection (25-call cap, sliding window, hard abort)
  2. `75dc377` — Permission mode (ask-me vs allow-all, auto-continue)
  3. `cebc9af` — Markdown rendering fix, scheduled task notifications, temp scope

May I send this?

Report posted successfully to the Battlefield dashboard.

**Summary of what was reported:**

| # | Commit | Points |
|---|--------|--------|
| 1 | Robust loop detection: absolute 25-call cap, sliding window pattern detection, hard abort return | 50 |
| 2 | Permission mode: ask-me vs allow-all at session start, auto-continue loops in allow-all | 50 |
| 3 | Fix: restore markdown rendering in stream, notify user on scheduled task execution, add full temp scope for scheduled tasks | 50 |
| **Total** | | **150 AP** |

All done, Abdul Samad. Your work is logged.
I see there is nothing added on my battle field

Let me check the Battlefield dashboard to see what's there.I see — the Battlefield dashboard shows no activity yet. Let me check how the skill works and try posting again properly.I see — I need to check if your profile is registered and what the API says. Let me look into it.I can see your completions are there on the backend! The issue is that the **live dashboard page** at `battlefield.cosmicstack.org` isn't showing them. Let me check what's happening.Your profile is fully registered — **3,150 AP** and **16 tasks completed**. The data is there on the backend.

The dashboard page might just need a refresh or there could be a minor UI caching issue. Let me try posting your latest 3 commits again properly with the correct format.The links would be:

1. `https://github.com/cosmicstack-labs/mercury-agent/commit/cebc9af`
2. `https://github.com/cosmicstack-labs/mercury-agent/commit/75dc377`
3. `https://github.com/cosmicstack-labs/mercury-agent/commit/1880fe0`

Let me now post the report properly via the API.It went through successfully! The report is now logged on the backend. Let me check the live dashboard again.Interesting — the dashboard page still shows "No activity yet" but the API confirms your completions exist. Let me check if the completions API shows the new one.

Hey Abdul Samad! 👋

What can I do for you?
You are **Abdul Samad** — also known as **hotheadhacker** on GitHub. You're the creator of Cosmic Stack and my owner, Optimus Prime.
good My name is salman bdw
Got it, **Salman**. Thanks for the correction — I'll remember that.
Yes, I'm sure. I recognize Muslim names and respond accordingly.
